lobe.name: Svrn7.Presence
lobe.title: SVRN7 Presence LOBE
lobe.description: Net-new DIDComm presence protocol. Publishes and receives TDA availability status across the VTC7 mesh. Presence state is held in IMemoryCache with configurable TTL.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Presence Status Update
protocols.description: Publishes or receives a TDA availability status. Body: { did, status, since, ttlSeconds }

protocols.title: Presence Subscription Request
protocols.description: Registers the requesting TDA as a subscriber to this TDA's presence updates.

cmdlets.name: Update-TdaPresence
cmdlets.title: Update Presence
cmdlets.description: Processes an inbound presence/1.0/status and caches the sender's status in IMemoryCache. TTL from message body.

MessageDid.description: TDA resource DID URL of the inbox message. Form: did:drn:{networkId}/inbox/msg/{objectId}

cmdlets.name: Add-TdaPresenceSubscription
cmdlets.title: Add Presence Subscriber
cmdlets.description: Registers the requesting TDA as a subscriber. After registration, immediately publishes current status to the new subscriber.

MessageDid.description: TDA resource DID URL of the inbox message. Form: did:drn:{networkId}/inbox/msg/{objectId}

cmdlets.name: Publish-TdaPresence
cmdlets.title: Publish Presence
cmdlets.description: Broadcasts this TDA's availability status to all subscribed peers. Returns one OutboundMessage per subscriber.

PeerEndpoint.description: HTTP/2 endpoint URL of the target TDA.

PackedMessage.description: JSON-serialised DIDComm message body (not yet packed — Switchboard packs before delivery).

MessageType.description: DIDComm @type URI of the outbound message.

outputSchema.description: One OutboundMessage per subscribed peer TDA.

cmdlets.name: Get-TdaPresence
cmdlets.title: Get Cached Presence
cmdlets.description: Returns the cached presence status for a peer TDA DID, or null if not cached.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Tracks and broadcasts TDA availability status across the VTC7 mesh. State is ephemeral (IMemoryCache). No durable presence store in Epoch 0.
useCases: Checking if a peer TDA is reachable before sending a message
Broadcasting TDA maintenance windows as Offline status
Notifying subscribers when a Society TDA comes back online
compositionHints: Call Get-TdaPresence before routing a time-sensitive message to verify the peer is Available
Publish-TdaPresence returns an array — pipe to foreach { $_ | Send-TdaMessage } or use Send-TdaMessage with ValueFromPipeline
Add-TdaPresenceSubscription returns nothing — it is a side-effect cmdlet
limitations: Epoch 0: presence state is in-process cache only. TDA restart clears all presence state.
No durable subscription store — subscriptions are lost on restart.
